infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take photos of your home repair issues.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select photos of your home repair issues.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Used to save photos of your home repair issues.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to record your voice so you can describe your home repair issue by speaking.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Used to convert your spoken description of the repair issue into text.

plugins.photosPermission: The app needs access to your photos to share images of your home repair issues.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app needs access to your camera to take photos of your home repair issues.

plugins.microphonePermission: Used to record your voice so you can describe your home repair issue by speaking.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Used to convert your spoken description of the repair issue into text.
